reasoning: The technical structure has shifted decisively bearish following the breakdown of the Value Area Low (VAL) at 64,200. The 15m chart confirms a 'support-turned-resistance' flip, where the recent bounce failed to reclaim the value area on declining volume, indicating a lack of buyer conviction. A high Long/Short ratio of 2.13 suggests a crowded retail long trade that is vulnerable to a liquidation flush. Furthermore, the 1h volume profile shows a significant 'air gap' or Low Volume Node (LVN) below 63,500, implying that once the current local support fails, price discovery will likely accelerate downward toward the 61k-62k liquidity zone. Negative Order Flow Delta reinforces the presence of aggressive sellers hitting the bid.
reasoning_zh: 技术结构在跌破 64,200 的价值区低点 (VAL) 后已明确转为看跌。15分钟图确认了“支撑变阻力”的转换，近期的反弹未能放量收回价值区，显示买盘动能枯竭。目前 2.13 的高多空比意味着散户多头头寸过度拥挤，极易引发清算连锁反应。此外，1小时成交量分布显示在 63,500 下方存在明显的“真空区”（低成交量节点），这意味着一旦局部支撑失守，价格将加速下行至 61k-62k 的流动性区域。持续为负的订单流 Delta 进一步证实了主动卖盘的压制。
